       Exam and Surgical Radiation Reducing Gloves.       
Developed with the physician in mind, these radiation reducing gloves offer the best protection with the greatest dexterity, sensitivity and comfort compared to similar products. Ideal for Radiology, Cath/Electro Physiology, Orthopedic Surgery, Endoscopy, Urology, and Pain Management. Ideal for all high exposure procedures where sensitivity and protection are essential. Color - warm gray.

Features:

  • NO latex, NO powder
  • Made with premium, pure lead oxide for maximum protection.
  • Thin fingertips provide enhanced tactile sensitivity.
  • Latex-Free and Hypoallergenic finish creates a smooth interior which reduces skin irritation.
  • Anatomically correct curved fingers reduce hand fatigue.
  • Sizes range from 6 - 9 in half sizes for a better fit. MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.
  • Attenuates up to 30% more direct beam radiation than other leading products.
  • Available in 0.280mm (0.012") and 0.220mm (0.0088") finger tip thickness.
  • 12" length.
  • Sterile packaging. (includes 1 right & 1 left)

[HTMLCS] WARNING|WCAG2AAA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H49.Center|center||Semantic markup should be used to mark emphasised or special text so that it can be programmatically determined.|
This new radiation reducing glove is perfect for when a higher protection glove is required. Still maintaining a fair ability for tactile sensitivity, they attenuate up to 59% at 120 kVp and 81% at 60 kVp. A fantastic glove for patient positioning during fluoro and/or animal positioning; procedures where your hands are close to the beam yet not requiring extreme tactile sensitivity. (See RR1 or RR2 above for enhanced tactile sensitivity required gloves.)
Color: Warm Gray.

Features:

  • No latex, no powder
  • Made with premium, pure lead oxide for maximum protection.
  • Latex-free & Hypoallergenic reducing proteins, antigens and irritation.
  • Soft-Touch finish creates a smooth interior also reducing skin irritation.
  • Anatomically correct curved fingers reduce hand fatigue.
  • Attenuates up to 50% more direct beam radiation than other leading products.
  • 12" length. Use with Proguard Sleeves (scroll below) for complete coverage: finger tip to bicep.
  • Available sizes: 7, 7.5 8, 8.5, 9 & 10 for an unequaled comfortable fit. MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.
  • Sterile packaging. (includes 1 right & 1 left)

    • Providing protection for Radiology, Cath/EP Lab, Orthopedics, Endoscopy, Urological Procedures, Special Procedures, O.R., and Pain Management.
    IDEAL FOR HIGH EXPOSURE PROCEDURES such as: Ablations, PTCAs, Billary Drainage, ICDs, Stents, TIPS, Pacemakers, Vascular Procedures, Lead Extraction.

  • Extreme flexigility does not restrict movement or dexterity.
